free_text: Neutron inelastic scattering with 14.36 MeV energy
Cylinders D=50 mm(external), D=15 mm(internal),h=60 mm,
Placed at 19.5 cm distance from neutron source.
Path length is 2 m, resolution is ~3 nsec/m.
Energy spectra were normalized by measured neutron flux
Corrections on spectrometer dead time, on backgrounds,
on multiple scattering and neutron attenuation in
sample were calculated by Monte-Carlo method.
DA/DE figs.1,2 for V, figs.3,4 for Ti ;
PAR,DA fig.5 for V, fig.6 for Ti.
Measured spectrum is sum for neutron from reactions
. Quantization error ( 1/2 pixel), maximal value for
scale X - 0.015 MeV, scale Y - 0.14 mb/sr/MeV.
